description: Setup Python environment and project structure. Install all required packages, create data/ and models/ directories, remove old notebooks.
steps: Install Python packages: pip install pandas numpy scikit-learn xgboost lightgbm scipy matplotlib seaborn shapely nbformat nbconvert jupyter-client ipykernel joblib
Create directories: data/ and models/ inside /projects/sandbox/geoumkm-smart-3/
Create data/.gitkeep and models/.gitkeep so the directories are tracked
Remove old notebooks from notebooks/ directory (all 6 existing .ipynb files)
Remove old HTML docs from docs/ directory (all 6 existing .html files)
Verify packages are importable by running a quick python -c test
acceptance_criteria: All packages (pandas, numpy, scikit-learn, xgboost, lightgbm, scipy, matplotlib, seaborn, shapely, nbformat, nbconvert) are importable
data/ and models/ directories exist with .gitkeep files
notebooks/ directory is empty (old files removed)
docs/ directory is empty (old files removed)
verification: Run: python -c "import pandas, numpy, sklearn, xgboost, lightgbm, scipy, matplotlib, seaborn, shapely, nbformat; print('All packages OK')"
findings: Python 3.9.25 available via pyenv as python3 (not python). All packages installed successfully. pip dependency conflict warning for awscli is benign and does not affect project packages. Use python3 (not python) for all subsequent commands.
